0:{"rsc":["$","$1","c",{"children":[[["$","h1",null,{"children":"System Design"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"High-level system architecture and component interactions."}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Component Diagram"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"chart":"\ngraph LR\n  subgraph Client[\"Client Layer\"]\n      A[Agent Application]\n      H[Hermes Framework]\n  end\n\n  subgraph API[\"API Layer\"]\n      P[Python SDK]\n      R[REST API]\n      T[Tool Schema]\n  end\n\n  subgraph Core[\"Core Engine\"]\n      M[Memory Manager]\n      R1[Retrieval Engine]\n      S[Sleep Consolidator]\n      I[Index Manager]\n  end\n\n  subgraph Storage[\"Storage Layer\"]\n      SQLite[(SQLite DB)]\n      V[Vector Index]\n      F[FTS5 Index]\n      G[Temporal Graph]\n  end\n\n  A --> P\n  H --> T\n  P --> M\n  R --> M\n  T --> M\n  M --> R1\n  M --> S\n  R1 --> I\n  S --> I\n  I --> SQLite\n  I --> V\n  I --> F\n  I --> G\n\n  style Core fill:#e0f2fe,stroke:#0284c7\n  style Storage fill:#f0fdf4,stroke:#16a34a\n"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Core Components"}],"\n",["$","h3",null,{"children":"Memory Manager"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Central orchestrator handling all CRUD operations. Routes operations to appropriate memory tiers and manages cross-tier consistency."}],"\n",["$","h3",null,{"children":"Retrieval Engine"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Hybrid search coordinator. Dispatches queries to vector and text indices, then fuses results using configurable ranking algorithms."}],"\n",["$","h3",null,{"children":"Sleep Consolidator"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Background worker running consolidation cycles. Compresses, promotes, extracts, and evicts entries according to retention policies."}],"\n",["$","h3",null,{"children":"Index Manager"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["Maintains all database indices: vector embeddings (via ",["$","code",null,{"children":"sqlite-vec"}],"), FTS5 full-text, and temporal graph relationships."]}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Technology Stack"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"| Layer | Technology | Purpose |\n|-------|-----------|---------|\n| Database | SQLite 3.45+ | Primary storage |\n| Vectors | sqlite-vec | Vector similarity search |\n| Text | FTS5 | Full-text search |\n| Embeddings | OpenAI / SentenceTransformers | Text-to-vector |\n| ORM | SQLAlchemy | Schema management |\n| API | FastAPI | REST endpoints |"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Scaling Considerations"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne is designed for single-node deployments:"}],"\n",["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Working Memory"}],": In-memory LRU with SQLite backing"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Episodic Memory"}],": SQLite with vector extension"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Semantic Memory"}],": Native graph in SQLite"]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"For multi-agent deployments, each agent maintains its own database instance. Shared memory is achieved via explicit synchronization, not concurrent database access."}],"\n",["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-warning","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L3",null,{"iconNode":[["path",{"d":"m21.73 18-8-14a2 2 0 0 0-3.48 0l-8 14A2 2 0 0 0 4 21h16a2 2 0 0 0 1.73-3","key":"wmoenq"}],["path",{"d":"M12 9v4","key":"juzpu7"}],["path",{"d":"M12 17h.01","key":"p32p05"}]],"className":"lucide-triangle-alert shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"Not a Distributed System"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne does not support distributed or clustered deployments. For high-availability requirements, use SQLite replication (Litestream) or export/import between instances."}]}]]}]]}]}]],[["$","script","script-0",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/06qv3~~e._cb6.js","async":true}],"$L4","$L5","$L6","$L7","$L8","$L9","$La","$Lb","$Lc"],"$Ld"]}],"isPartial":false,"staleTime":300,"varyParams":null,"buildId":"QQSqVRZ0L1fJQFST1lZ0f"}
